name: Fresh California Tomato Summer Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions and celery in oil in a stockpot over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, or until tender.
2. Stir in garlic, zucchini, and corn; sauté 2 more minutes.
3. Add chicken stock, bring to a boil, and add remaining ingredients except Parmesan cheese.
4. Cook until pasta is tender, about 10 minutes.
5. To serve, spoon 1-1/2 cups soup into each bowl. Top each with 1 tsp Parmesan cheese.
